creator: lexa@libraw.com
text:
To be precise:
1) This is clean 14.1 install (in VMWare)
2) then updated to 14.1-p5 via freebsd-update
3) PermitRootLogin yes added to sshd_config for ssh tests
4) no other users added to system, everything is from root, no way to change user.

13.3 was tested the same way (clean install to VM, freebsd-update)


And, yes, I use FreeBSD since 1994 or so for most my servers.
